user.title: SoundServer
user.description: Enter the base URL of your SoundServer (e.g. http://10.0.14.50/sound).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach a SoundServer at that URL.

play.name: Play sound
play.description: Play a sound file from the library on one or more speakers.

count.name: Repeat
count.description: How many times to play it (1-20).

background.name: Background
background.description: Optional background sound to mix underneath.

speak.name: Speak text
speak.description: Convert text to speech and play it on one or more speakers.

background.name: Background
background.description: Optional background sound to mix underneath.

refresh_speakers.name: Refresh speakers
refresh_speakers.description: Re-query the Sound Server for its speaker list.
